name: O.R.C. Cockroach Nymph
description: The O.R.C. Cockroach Nymph is the militarized juvenile form of the cockroach nymph. It keeps the same swarm speed, but now behaves far more aggressively to close gaps for the adult variants.
behavior: It moves in small groups through O.R.C. routes and trashy areas, rarely stopping for long. In combat it tries to stay on top of the player to wear them down and create openings for the bigger roaches.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and works best in groups. One alone is manageable, but several together force you to waste time defending against small targets.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually accompanies adult O.R.C. cockroaches and the queen, acting as a mobile screen and cheap pressure source.
strategy: They are not individually complex, so the right answer is to erase them quickly before they ruin the readability of the main fight. Ignore them long enough and they start stealing heals and space.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick swarm bite meant to harass and stack pressure.
